_note: Batch u5 (undated married-in spouses) given DOCUMENTED parents + full siblings. FILLED 30 of 45. SKIPPED 15 whose own parentage is undocumented/legendary (no fabrication): PTOLEMYMAURW (Julia Urania — uncertain, poss. Emesene), ZILLAH (Gen 4:19, no parents named), CUNIGUNDA of Laon (obscure), ROTRUDE of Hesbaye (disputed/conjectural), ADELAIDEMETZ (conjectural), KENNIIW ('wife, unrecorded'), AMYNTASOFALEXW (name/parents unknown), TAMAR (Gen 38, no parents named), LIUTSWIND (uncertain), FIORETTA Gorini (unknown), RAHAB (no parents named), ZIBIAH (only 'of Beersheba'), PEPINITALYW (Bertha/Chrothais — uncertain), ARSINOEMAC (herself a 'traditional' figure, parentage obscure). Plus LOTDAU1 SKIPPED — already parented in the tree (LOT x Lot's wife SPL_LOTWIFE, with sister LOTDAU2). DEDUP/links to existing nodes: ARSINOE3 -> existing PTOLEMY3 x BERENICE2 (existing brother PTOLEMY4); ADELAIDEIT -> new Rudolf II x Bertha of Swabia linking existing brother SPE_CONRADBURG; ELEANORPORT -> existing father DUARTE; HENRYSPEYER -> existing couple OTTOWORMS x OTTOWORMSW (existing brother Pope Gregory V GREGORYV). ALFONSOENRW identified as Juana de Mendoza. Jubilees/Genesis/Dudo/tradition figures flagged in-label. New nodes use SPK_ prefix. Web-standard references (Wikipedia, Josephus, scripture). Verified 2026-07-16.
